description_long: This skateboard features a well-worn wooden deck with visible scuffs and a faded, partially obscured graphic on the underside. The deck is a standard popsicle shape with rounded nose and tail, and the top is covered in black grip tape with a single yellowish stripe running across it. The trucks are metallic and show signs of use, with standard kingpin mounting and attached to four white, slightly dirty street-style wheels. The underside graphic includes some red and white text, though it is partially worn away, and the wood shows signs of heavy use. The overall appearance suggests this skateboard has been used extensively in urban environments, with a rugged, authentic look.
description: A well-used skateboard with a black grip-taped top, faded deck graphic, metallic trucks, and white street wheels. The deck shows significant wear and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skateboard's thickness, wheel alignment, and the curvature of the deck's nose and tail.
description_view_1: Bottom view highlighting the worn deck graphic, visible trucks, and all four wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the deck's profile, wheel placement, and curvature.
description_view_3: Top view displaying the black grip tape with a yellowish stripe and the mounting bolts for the trucks.
attribute_brand_logo: A partially visible red and white logo with the text 'CRESCY' is present on the underside of the deck, near one end.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a worn, urban-style graphic with a faded brown background, some black and yellowish areas, and a partially visible red and white text logo. The design is heavily scuffed and distressed.
attribute_wheel_type: Classic street wheels, white in color, standard size, with no visible branding or markings.
attribute_truck_style: Standard metallic skateboard trucks with a raw finish, top-mounted, showing signs of wear and no visible branding.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape with a single yellowish stripe running across the width of the deck; no additional graphics or cut-outs.
